final_answer: Source boundary remains open due to a critical destination mismatch. Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 specifies Chile, while export license LIC-SIE-073 authorizes only Peru for the same ECCN and end-user. Policy STD-SIE-073-P mandates exact source-boundary closure before export. The warning WARN-SIE-073 reinforces the need for precise evidence. Action must escalate until this destination alignment is confirmed or corrected in the source records.
